summary: Stingray /api/gis returned 5 listings with structured fields (MLS#, lat/lng, sqft, year_built, DOM). aggregate-trends returned median list $500K, $/sqft $323, DOM 44, 2021 active. sync-search inserted 50 placards into listing_snapshots+homes. trends multi-region overlay works after parser rewrite. All 25 leaf commands --help exit 0 and dry-run cleanly.
